home.hero_title: Chat anytime, anywhere in your roleplay app.
home.hero_subtitle: Your proactive companion agents are waiting.
home.hero_note: Experience the charm of Talkie Claw.
home.recommended_subtitle: Recommended by age, preference, and chat history
home.tasks_subtitle: Helper bots that complete practical jobs inside a roleplay shell.

chat.private_photo_beta: Private photo open during free beta

create.title: Create Your Talkie
create.list_subtitle: Drafts, under-review submissions, and published characters.

quick_create.title: Quick Character Create
quick_create.headline: Pick a few feelings. AI fills the rest.
quick_create.subtitle: Use a conflict, relationship start, and one optional memory to make a chat-ready character in minutes.
quick_create.required_hint: Required: choose a scene and at least 1 trait. Everything else is optional; defaults are already selected.
quick_create.audit_blocked: Publish audit did not pass. Open advanced edit to fix it.
quick_create.no_preview: Complete the first four steps to generate a preview.
quick_create.memory_label: What should they remember at the start? (optional)
quick_create.memory_placeholder: Example: They owe me an explanation.
quick_create.custom_placeholder: Example: Less action narration, more natural chat.
quick_create.custom_scene_placeholder: Write your own scene, such as: my quiet tattoo artist neighbor.
quick_create.traits_hint: Choose up to 3. Defaults are already selected, so you can continue.
quick_create.image_prompt_placeholder: Optional image note, such as: silver hair, raincoat, warm cafe light
quick_create.template_title: Who do you want to start a story with?

create.name: Name
create.settings_help: Can't be seen by the user, only affects the dialogue effect
create.settings_placeholder: Settings of the character, including all the background, personality, speaking style, and rules. Use '{user}' for the chatter and '{char}' for the character.
create.intro: Intro (No impact on the character's reply)
create.intro_help: Introduction of your character doesn't affect the dialogue effect
create.intro_placeholder: Anything you want to show or say to the users…
create.first_message_placeholder: The opening line that starts the conversation. Use *italics* for actions.
create.publish_visibility_help: Private and public publishing both run the same character-card audit before the character can be used.

private.label: Private
private.help: Chat-ready after audit, visible only to you.

public.label: Public
public.help: Goes to moderation after audit, then appears in discovery.

create.image_style_suffix_help: Appended to every portrait prompt so all renders of this character share the same medium, palette, lighting, and framing. AI Writer fills it for you — most creators never need to edit it.
create.image_style_suffix_placeholder: e.g. anime illustration, warm amber and ink-black palette, soft window backlight, 3:4 portrait single subject
create.voice_preset_help: AI Writer recommends a TTS tone from the character's gender, core traits, and speaking style. You can override it before saving.
create.style_examples_help: Few-shot user/character turns that teach the model this character's cadence, action formatting, and emotional response pattern.
create.style_example_user_placeholder: User line, e.g. You disappeared again.
create.style_example_character_placeholder: Ideal character reply in this character's voice.
create.skill_desc: Supports additional capabilities like Image Generation and Song Creation, expanding Talkie's potential use cases
create.image_prompt_placeholder: For example: rainy city street, same character, black trench coat, cinematic lighting, change only the scene and pose, keep the same face and hairstyle
create.image_desc: Add image to make your Talkie more engaging
create.voice_desc: Choose a voice for your Talkie
create.tags_help: Pick one or more categories so your Talkie shows up in the matching tab.
create.persistence_line: Drafts persist locally for guests and in the database after sign-in.
create.notice: Notice: Everything Talkies says is made up by AI!
create.editable_private_published: This private character is already published, but you can still edit it. Saving updates your private version directly.

list_empty.title: No characters yet
list_empty.subtitle: Tap Create a Talkie to start building your first character.
list_empty.draft: No drafts. Create a Talkie to start one.

ai_writer_dialog.title: AI Writer
ai_writer_dialog.subtitle: Generate a complete character draft. You can refine each field after.
ai_writer_dialog.error: AI Writer hit a snag. Try Retry.

validation.settings_required: Settings (system prompt) is required before publishing.
validation.name_too_long: Name must be 18 characters or less.

publish_audit.title: Publish audit needs fixes
publish_audit.blocked_toast: Publishing is blocked. Fix the fields listed below, then publish again.
publish_audit.summary_fallback: The audit found consistency issues that would hurt chat quality.
publish_audit.manual_hint: Use the exact fields, evidence, and recommendations below to fix the draft, or let AI draft a repair before you review, save, and publish again.
publish_audit.repair_applied: AI repair was applied to the form. Review it, save, then publish again.
publish_audit.repair_partial: AI applied the best repair it could, but some blocking issues still remain. Continue fixing the fields listed below.

create.locked_under_review: This character is under review. You can't edit it until a moderator approves or rejects it.
create.locked_published: This character is already published. Delete it first if you need to make changes.
create.confirm_delete: Delete this character? This cannot be undone.

memory.title: Memory
memory.placeholder: Save a long-term fact, preference, or scene rule for this character.

my_ai.title: My AI
my_ai.subtitle: Drafts, published characters, follows, and recent chats.
my_ai.empty_text: Create a persona draft and it will appear here.

posts.spring: New character challenge: create a spring-themed Talkie and drop the link.
posts.song: Tell me your favorite song and I will make a character who would listen to it.
posts.detective: I finally made a detective who remembers tiny clues.

pricing.title: Talkie+ is open for beta
pricing.subtitle: Checkout, subscription callbacks, billing, and credits all route through the ShipAny payment stack.

free_beta.name: Free beta
free_beta.desc: Roleplay chat, voice previews, gallery access

creator_beta.name: Creator beta
creator_beta.desc: Create Talkies, test memories, keep drafts locally

pro_beta.name: Pro beta
pro_beta.desc: Longer context experiments and priority model testing

detail.comments_empty: No comments yet. Be the first to say hi.
detail.comments_placeholder: Share a thought about this Talkie…
detail.comments_signin: Sign in to leave a comment.

chat_page.empty_hint: Try a question, a moment, or pick up where they left off.
chat_page.error: Could not get a reply. Try again.
chat_page.low_credits_hint: This action needs {required} credit(s). You currently have {remaining}.
chat_page.voice_error: Could not play this voice. Try again.
chat_page.ooc_regenerate_title: This feels out of character. Diagnose and rewrite.
chat_page.sign_in_notice: Sign in to keep this chat across devices.
chat_page.history_subtitle: Review the recent saved conversations for this character.
chat_page.history_sign_in: Sign in to view saved roleplay chat history.
